entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH THIS EVENING

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST 5 TO 10 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

SUNNY
LESS HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS AROUND 80
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
